abstract.text: A collection that supports replacement of an arbitrary subrange of elements
with the elements of another collection.

abstract.text: Applies the given difference to this collection.
Removes the specified subrange of elements from the collection.
A collection representing a contiguous subrange of this collection’s
elements. The subsequence shares indices with the original collection.
Adds an element to the end of the collection.
Adds the elements of a sequence or collection to the end of this
collection.
Removes all the elements that satisfy the given predicate.
Inserts the elements of a sequence into the collection at the specified
position.

A view of a string’s contents as a collection of Unicode scalar values.
Creates a new collection containing the specified number of a single,
repeated value.
Build apps using a powerful open language.

abstract.text: Returns a new collection in which all occurrences of a sequence matching
the given regex are replaced by another collection.
